prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response: I require the assistance of a medieval chronicler to document the remarkable achievements of a modern SaaS company in the third quarter of their fiscal year. In the year of our Lord s 2018, the company's sales increased by a staggering 18% compared to the previous quarter and a remarkable 24% compared to the same quarter in the previous fiscal year. The company's operations are becoming more efficient at an astonishing rate, as evidenced by their operating expenses increasing only 2% while achieving a 24% increase in sales. This is an indication of the company's commitment to achieving excellence in all facets of their operations, including their financial management. The company's financial statements for the third quarter are a testament to their pursuit of excellence and their desire to provide the highest quality service to their customers while also keeping their operating costs in check. The company's management team is committed to achieving these goals and their accomplishments in the third quarter of their fiscal year are truly remarkable.
